[For an explanation of the Karanas see the author's funda-
mentals of Astrology' p. 185, also C. 1-2 infra. The word Divasa
means both a Weekday and a lunar day. Generally Monday, Wed-
nesday, Thursday and Friday are good provided their lords are not
weak or afflicted. The lunar days arc divided into five groups viz.
Nandn, Bhadrd, Jay a, Rikid. and Puma. An auspicious asterism is one
which is other than the Darwna (Dreadful) and (Fierce) and one
that is Gentle and Common that is free from malefics. Good omens

Glory of Indrd's Banner XLlll 347
are curds, coloured rice, flowers etc. In the Tdtrll, Karanas other than
Gar a, Vanija and Visti are recommended. There arc 15 Muhurtas
in the day and 15 in the night. They are given in the following
verse :
